concerns.text: T019 (post-hoc power analysis) is placed in User Story 1 after preprocessing. Per FR-010/SC-005, power analysis determines sample-size requirements BEFORE data acquisition. This should be in Phase 2 (Foundational) or before US1 begins.
T016 (Nilearn fallback) is marked [P] but it's a conditional fallback for T013 (fMRIPrep). Fallbacks are not parallel-safe—they execute only if the primary fails. Remove [P] tag.
T030 (associational framing validator) is marked [P] but it validates OUTPUT from analysis tasks. This is a post-processing check, not parallel-safe. Remove [P] tag.
T033 (R metafor wrapper) is marked [P] but it's a prerequisite for T034 (meta-analysis). The wrapper must exist before meta-analysis can run. Remove [P] tag.
T038 (dataset scarcity contingency) is marked [P] but it's a gating condition that must be evaluated BEFORE T034 runs. This is a decision point, not parallel work. Remove [P] tag.

T043-T044 (unit tests) are placed after implementation tasks. Per the spec's 'Tests MUST be written and FAIL before implementation' guidance, test tasks should precede or be interleaved with implementation, not appended at the end.

T028 (NBS correction) and T029 (FWE correction) are separate tasks, but the spec describes NBS with component-wise FWE as a single correction step. T029 should be dependent on T028 (not parallel) or merged to avoid fragmented implementation.
